title: Where to stay downtown — Manhattan, 21–28 June 2026
subtitle: Ten options below 20th Street fit a £3–4k budget for the week. Three are easy yeses. The play is to book one **this week** — refundable — then monitor.
description: A tight three-pick brief on downtown Manhattan hotels for a solo 7-night stay, 21–28 June 2026, on a £3,000–£4,000 budget. Walker Hotel Greenwich Village, The Ludlow, and Arlo SoHo are the three picks. Book refundable now; monitor weekly.
